description:
Launch readiness audit for hx-accordion. Using the documentation template from the FOUNDATION ticket, ensure this component is production-ready.

## SUB-COMPONENTS INCLUDED (MANDATORY)
This ticket also covers **hx-accordion-item** (`hx-accordion/hx-accordion-item.ts`). This is a registered custom element that must be validated for A11y, exports, and documentation alongside the parent. Do NOT skip it.

## Checklist
1. **A11y healthcare compliance** — Run axe-core audit on BOTH hx-accordion AND hx-accordion-item. Verify ARIA roles (accordion pattern per WAI-ARIA APG), keyboard navigation (Arrow keys, Home, End, Enter/Space), screen reader announcements. Zero WCAG 2.1 AA violations.
2. **Astro documentation page** — Create/update `apps/docs/src/content/docs/component-library/hx-accordion.md` using the standard template. All 12 sections filled: overview, demo, install, usage, properties, events, CSS custom properties, CSS parts, slots, accessibility, Drupal integration, standalone HTML example. Must document hx-accordion-item API too.
3. **Individual export test** — Verify `import '@helix/library/components/hx-accordion'` works in isolation and exports BOTH hx-accordion and hx-accordion-item. Create a minimal HTML page that loads ONLY this component and renders correctly.
4. **Existing tests pass** — Run `npm run verify` to confirm lint, format, type-check pass. Do NOT run vitest directly (CI handles browser tests).

## Known Patterns (from HELIX-PLATFORM-PROTO-LESSONS.md)
- C-PATTERN-01: Never add `= null` to `@query` fields — use `!` assertion
- C-PATTERN-02: Never call `setAttribute()` in constructor — use `connectedCallback()`
- C-PATTERN-05: Use `div[role="list"]` instead of `<ul>/<ol>` with slotted web components
- C-PATTERN-06: Register event listeners BEFORE any `await` calls

## Files
- `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-accordion/` (component source — includes hx-accordion-item.ts)
- `apps/docs/src/content/docs/component-library/hx-accordion.md` (documentation)

## Acceptance Criteria
- Zero axe-core violations (both parent and sub-component)
- Doc page complete per template (all 12 sections, sub-component API documented)
- Individual import works in standalone HTML (both elements render)
- `npm run verify` passes
